name: St. Patrick's Day
traditions: Parades; wearing green; shamrock displays; Irish music and dance; Greening landmarks (rivers, buildings); Guinness drinking.
historicalBackground: St. Patrick's Day honors Ireland's patron saint, who brought Christianity to Ireland in the 5th century. It became a global celebration through the Irish diaspora.
description: Ireland's global green celebration, honoring the patron saint with parades, music, and the worldwide greening of landmarks.
